---
title: "Abraham Kuyper"
---

## Abraham Kuyper

**Dates:** (1837-1920)

### Description

Dutch theologian and Prime Minister

### Biography

His life was changed by reading <i>The Heir of Redclyffe</i>; Lord Mount Temple offered to arrange for CMY to meet him.

### Letters

- Letter from June 21 [1874]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
